allow: Bash(git commit -m 'fix: update node engine to 24.x for Vercel *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: remove engines field, node version set in Vercel dashboard *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: use npx react-scripts build to avoid permission denied error *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: remove eslint devDep, use plain npm install to fix permission denied *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: remove react-leaflet \(unused, conflicts with React 18\) *)
Bash(git commit -m 'fix: call react-scripts via node directly to bypass permission denied *)
